sheet_name: บ้านสานฝัน ของขวัญปีใหม่ คนไทยมีความสุข
source_image: image/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า61.png
schema_note: t4: pattern reclassified from 'unknown' (t3) to 'title' (2026-07-08 taxonomy) -- JUDGMENT CALL flagged: the schema doc only defines 'title' as 'หน้าปก' (front cover) without a front/back distinction. Classifying this back-cover catalog page as 'title' too since it is cover-type front-matter with zero takeoff content, not because the doc explicitly says back covers count -- same judgment call as documented in the migration script's PATTERN_OVERRIDES comment for the earlier token-saving attempt (since discarded).
raw_text: บ้านสานฝัน ของขวัญปีใหม่ คนไทยมีความสุข -- กรมโยธาธิการและผังเมือง กระทรวงมหาดไทย. Catalog grid of 10 'บ้านครอบครัวไทยร่วมสมัย' (Contemporary Thai Family House) designs numbered 1-10, each shown as a small rendered exterior photo/illustration with a car in the driveway. No takeoff-relevant content.
description: Government (Department of Public Works and Town & Country Planning) back-cover advertising this house design as part of a numbered series of standard house plans -- confirms this house is one of a published catalog of designs, not a bespoke one-off. No dimensions, specs, or structural content of any kind.
